Title: Authorizes George Orfanoudakis to receive certain retroactive membership in the New York state and local police and fire retirement system
Summary: Authorizes George Orfanoudakis to receive certain retroactive membership in the New York state and local police and fire retirement system.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing George Orfanoudakis to receive certain retroactive membership in the New York state and local police and fire retirement system
